text: I find myself suspended between two worlds: the sterile order of the meeting room and the bold, creative chaos of the exhibition. In the first image, the glass walls and neat chairs evoke a sense of distance and anticipation—a place for structured interaction and calculated discussion. Yet as I step into the colorful R&D showcase in the second scene, I feel an awakening; curiosity stirs within me as ideas pulse through the screens and words on display. Here, innovation and discovery are palpable. I feel the tension between routine and possibility, and I am invigorated by the contrast, compelled to contemplate how structure and creativity must coexist for progress to happen.
